IODINE: Amiodarone (= antiarrhythmic drug with 37% iodine by weight)
GOLD: 95-145 HU (range of normal for liver 30-70 HU) Colloidal form of gold for therapy of rheumatoid arthritis Alpha-emitter with atomic number of 90 Accidental / suicidal ingestion of rodenticides (lethal dose is 0.2-1.0 gram)
